== Mosasaur ♂ ==
An ancient marine reptile. Its huge body was recreated through genetic engineering.

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Mosasaur, you must complete the [[Mailbox#Loch Nessie Manager|Loch Nessie Manager]] storyline.

===☆☆☆ > ★★★===
After 4 letters, Mosasaur will permanently move into [[Home Base]] with his minion, Nanosaur.

==Rent==
Mosasaur rent is collected on '''Saturday''' and found as a rib-cage to the left corner of the room

[[File:Mosasaur RENT.png|left]]
 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Green Organ Slime|green}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Prehistoric Fossil, +20|purple}}

{{Clear}}

==Relics==
Upgrading these will earn evolution chests!

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward 
|-
|★
|20 Evolution Chests
|-
|★★
|20 Evolution Chests
|-
|★★★
|20 Evolution Chests
|-
|★★★★
|40 Evolution Chests
|-
|★★★★★
|60 Evolution Chests
|-
| ★★★★★★
|80 Evolution Chests
|}<br>

{| class="fandom-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
! style="background-color:#7de8e6;" |[[File:Big Fish Bone.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Big Fish Bone]]<br>[[Big Fish Bone]] 
! style="background-color:#7de8e6;" |[[File:Gregor Specimen.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Gregor Specimen]]<br>[[Gregor Specimen]] 
! style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" |[[File:Prehistoric Fossil.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Prehistoric Fossil]]<br>[[Prehistoric Fossil]] 
! style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" |[[File:Gee Virus.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Gee Virus]]<br>[[Gee Virus]]
|-
! style="background-color:#ffb066;" | [[File:Fu Hao Scripts.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Fu Hao Scripts]]<br>[[Fu Hao Scripts]]
! style="background-color:#ffb066;" |[[File:Phoenix Feather.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Phoenix Feather]]<br>[[Phoenix Feather]] 
! style="background-color:#ffb066;" |[[File:Golden Scarab.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Golden Scarab]]<br>[[Golden Scarab]] 
! style="background-color:#ffb066;" |[[File:Ape's Footprint Fossil.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Ape's Footprint Fossil]]<br>[[Ape's Footprint Fossil]]
|}

==Mosasaur's Giant Teeth==
These curved sharp teeth are like rows of inverted hooks. With the Mosasaur's amazing jaw power, it can easily tear its prey to pieces
{| class="sortable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!'''Lv.'''!!'''Research Skill Required'''!!'''B-tad Cost'''!!'''Skill 1'''!!'''Skill 2'''
|-
|1|| || ||CIV +5||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +0.3%
|-
|2||180||2,000||CIV +10||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +0.6%
|-
|3||190||4,500||CIV +15||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +0.9%
|-
|4||200||8,000||CIV +20||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +1.2%
|-
|5||210||12,500||CIV +25||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|-
|6||220||18,000||CIV +30||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +1.8%
|-
|7||230||24,500||CIV +35||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +2.1%
|-
|8||240||32,000||CIV +40||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +2.4%
|-
|9||250||40,500||CIV +45||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +2.7%
|-
|10||260||50,000||CIV +50||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +3.0%
|-
|11||270||60,500||CIV +55||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +3.3%
|-
|12||285||72,000||CIV +60||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +3.6%
|-
|13||300||84,500||CIV +65||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +3.9%
|-
|14||315||98,000||CIV +70||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +4.2%
|-
|15||330||112,000||CIV +75||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +4.5%
|-
|16||345||123,000||CIV +80||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +4.8%
|-
|17||360||144,000||CIV +85||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +5.1%
|-
|18||375||162,000||CIV +90||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +5.4%
|-
|19||390||180,000||CIV +95||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +5.7%
|-
|20||400||200,000||CIV +100||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +6.0%
|-
|21||420||220,000||CIV +105||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +6.3%
|-
|22||440||242,000||CIV +110||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +6.6%
|-
|23||460||264,000||CIV +115||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +6.9%
|-
|24||480||285,000||CIV +120||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +7.2%
|-
|25||500||309,000||CIV +125||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +7.5%
|-
|26||520||333,000||CIV +130||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +7.8%
|-
|27||540||357,000||CIV +135||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +8.1%
|-
|28||560||381,000||CIV +140||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +8.4%
|-
|29||580||405,000||CIV +145||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +8.7%
|-
|30||600||429,000||CIV +150||Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +9.0%
|}

== Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Giant Teeth is. 
{| class="sortable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!'''Lv.'''!!'''B-tad Cost'''!!'''Skill 1'''!! '''Skill 2'''
|-
|1|| ||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +10 
|-
|2||4000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +20
|-
|3||6000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +30
|-
|4||8000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +40
|-
|5||10000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +50
|-
|6||12000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +60
|-
|7||14000||Dragon Minion MAX +1 || Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +70
|-
|8||16000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +80 
|-
|9||18000||Dragon Minion MAX +1|| Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +90
|-
|10||20000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +100
|-
|11||22000||Dragon Minion MAX +1|| Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +110
|-
|12||24000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +120
|-
|13||26000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +130
|-
|14||28000||Dragon Minion MAX +1 || Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +140
|-
|15||30000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +150
|-
|16||32000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +160
|-
|17||34000||Dragon Minion MAX +1 ||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +170
|-
|18||36000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +180
|-
|19||38000 ||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +190
|-
|20||40000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +200
|-
|21||42000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +210
|-
|22||44000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +220
|-
|23||46000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +230
|-
|24||48000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +240
|-
|25||50000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +250
|-
|26||55000||Dragon Minion MAX +1 ||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +260
|-
|27||60000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +270
|-
|28||65000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +280
|-
|29||70000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +290
|-
|30||75000||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop DEF +300
|}

==Research Ability==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Mosasaur specializes in '''Dragon Genes''' specialization and therefore the research manual cost for the Dragon is halved. 

{|class="sortable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Lv.!!Manuals Required!!Lv.!!Manuals Required
|-
|'''1-10'''||1||'''11-20'''||2
|-
|'''21-30'''||3||'''31-40'''||4
|-
|'''41-50'''||5||'''51-60'''||10
|-
|'''61-70'''||20||'''71-80'''||40
|-
|'''81-90'''||60||'''91-95'''||80
|-
|'''96'''||100||'''97'''||200
|-
|'''98'''||400||'''99'''||600
|-
|'''100'''||800 
|}

==Minion - Nanosaur==
The oviparous reptile that once dominated the world, the greatest predator, was once sent to the zoo as an ornamental animal because of poverty...

===Special Ability - Giant Jaw ===
Per 10 Nanosaurs in battle, Troop ATK +10 (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Nanosaurs!
{| class="wikitable"
!'''Name'''
!'''1-Star'''
!'''2-Star'''
!'''3-Star''' 
!'''4-Star''' 
!'''5-Star'''
!'''6-Star'''
|-
|[[Pumpkin Coach|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Pumpkin Coach</span>]]
|Nanosaur HP +1%
|Nanosaur DEF +1%
|Nanosaur ATK +1%
|Nanosaur RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
|[[Pinocchio|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Pinocchio</span>]]
|Nanosaur HP +1%
|Nanosaur DEF +1%
|Nanosaur ATK +1%
|Nanosaur RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
|[[Prince's Rose|<span style="color:#ee96d5;">Prince's Rose</span>]]
|Nanosaur HP +2%
|Nanosaur DEF +2% 
|Nanosaur ATK +2%
|Nanosaur RUSH +2%
|Nanosaur All Stats +3%
|
|-
|[[Mermaid Statue|<span style="color:#ee96d5;">Mermaid Statue</span>]]
|Nanosaur HP +2%
|Nanosaur DEF +2%
|Nanosaur ATK +2%
|Nanosaur RUSH +2%
|Nanosaur All Stats +3%
|
|-
|[[1001 Nights|<span style="color:#ffb066;">1001 Nights</span>]]
|Nanosaur DEF +4%
|Nanosaur DEF +4%
|Nanosaur DEF +4%
|Nanosaur DEF +4%
|Nanosaur DEF +4%
|Nanosaur DEF +4%
|-
|[[Ship in a Bottle|<span style="color:#ffb066;">Ship in a Bottle</span>]]
|Nanosaur RUSH +4%
|Nanosaur RUSH +4%
|Nanosaur RUSH +4%
|Nanosaur RUSH +4%
|Nanosaur RUSH +4%
|Nanosaur RUSH +4%
|-
|[[Terracotta Warrior|<span style="color:#ffb066;">Terracotta Warrior</span>]]
|Nanosaur HP +4%
|Nanosaur HP +4%
|Nanosaur HP +4%
|Nanosaur HP +4%
|Nanosaur HP +4%
|Nanosaur HP +4%
|-
|[[Aladdin Carpet|<span style="color:#ffb066;">Aladdin Carpet</span>]]
|Nanosaur ATK +4%
|Nanosaur ATK +4%
|Nanosaur ATK +4%
|Nanosaur ATK +4%
|Nanosaur ATK +4%
|Nanosaur ATK +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
